general_group_1_criteria.definition: Simple to set-up and use, not custom-made, frequently prescribed, and stands alone without integration with other equipment
general_group_1_criteria.prescribing_requirements: Only stipulated professional qualification required (no minimum experience or previous prescription count needed)
general_group_1_criteria.note: For complex clients (e.g., significant neurological impairment, spinal cord injury), inexperienced clinicians should seek additional clinical supervision even when prescribing Group 1 equipment
